biography: Mikael is a golfer hailing from Kurk Golf, known for his thoughtful approach to the game and meticulous planning on the course. While he may come across as reserved, those who know him well understand his dry sense of humor and unwavering determination.
Mikael has appeared at the Hector Trophée on one occasion. While he has yet to capture the coveted Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, his dedication to the sport is undeniable.
Although Mikael is considered retired from the Hector Trophée, his presence is still felt by many. We wish him well.
